title: Title
reflection_tip: Answer honestly. There are no right answers — the goal is to know yourself better.
import_files: Import entries from archive or .md/.txt files
export_pdf_desc: Compile all your entries into a single PDF — no encryption, readable by anyone. Great for sharing with a therapist.
prompt_self_reflection_0: What is occupying your mind today?
prompt_self_reflection_1: What part of your day would you have lived differently?
prompt_self_reflection_2: What have you learned about yourself recently?
prompt_self_reflection_3: What are you proud of today?
prompt_self_reflection_4: What do you need to let go of?
prompt_self_reflection_5: If you could give yourself advice right now, what would it be?
prompt_self_reflection_7: How would you describe your state of mind today?
prompt_self_reflection_8: What do you wish people understood about you?
prompt_self_reflection_9: What conversation do you need to have with yourself?
prompt_gratitude_0: What are you grateful for today, even if small?
prompt_gratitude_1: Who made a positive difference in your day?
prompt_gratitude_2: What moment from today would you like to keep?
prompt_gratitude_3: What are you grateful for about yourself?
prompt_gratitude_4: What do you usually take for granted but noticed today?
prompt_gratitude_5: What simple comfort or pleasure did you experience today?
prompt_gratitude_6: What opportunity do you have that others might not?
prompt_gratitude_7: What reminded you today that life is good?
prompt_growth_learning_1: What mistake or challenge taught you something valuable?
prompt_growth_learning_2: How are you different today compared to six months ago?
prompt_growth_learning_4: What would you do differently knowing what you know now?
prompt_growth_learning_5: What feedback did you receive and how can you use it?
prompt_growth_learning_6: What did you understand better after today?
prompt_growth_learning_7: What discomfort today was actually growth?
prompt_emotional_awareness_0: What emotion was most present today?
prompt_emotional_awareness_2: How did your body react to your emotions today?
prompt_emotional_awareness_3: Did you let yourself feel fully, or did you avoid something?
prompt_emotional_awareness_4: What emotion do you struggle to name?
prompt_emotional_awareness_5: What made you smile or laugh today?
prompt_emotional_awareness_6: Was there a moment when your reaction was bigger than the situation deserved?
prompt_emotional_awareness_7: What do you need emotionally today?
prompt_relationships_0: How did you connect with someone today?
prompt_relationships_1: Was there a moment of disconnection or conflict?
prompt_relationships_2: What do you appreciate about someone in your life?
prompt_relationships_3: How could you show gratitude to someone?
prompt_relationships_4: How do you show up for the people you love?
prompt_relationships_5: What important conversation are you avoiding?
prompt_relationships_7: How can you be more present with those around you?
prompt_goals_purpose_0: What moves you at this point in life?
prompt_goals_purpose_1: Are you closer or further from where you want to be?
prompt_goals_purpose_2: What small step did you take today toward a bigger goal?
prompt_goals_purpose_3: What is distracting you from what truly matters?
prompt_goals_purpose_4: What legacy do you want to build?
prompt_goals_purpose_5: What gives you energy and a sense of purpose?
prompt_goals_purpose_6: Are you living according to your values today?
prompt_goals_purpose_7: What version of yourself is being built right now?
prompt_mindfulness_0: Where were you in this moment, beyond the physical place?
prompt_mindfulness_1: Were you able to be present today or did your mind wander?
prompt_mindfulness_2: What small beauty did you notice today?
prompt_mindfulness_3: How was your breathing throughout the day?
prompt_mindfulness_4: Did you eat slowly and mindfully or on autopilot?
prompt_mindfulness_5: What did you see, hear, or feel outdoors today?
prompt_mindfulness_6: Was there a moment of true silence today?
prompt_mindfulness_7: What was your mind doing while your body was doing something else?
prompt_resilience_0: What difficulty did you face today and how did you handle it?
prompt_resilience_1: What inner strength did you discover in yourself?
prompt_resilience_2: How did you care for yourself during a tough moment?
prompt_resilience_3: What kept you steady when things got hard?
prompt_resilience_4: What past challenge prepared you for today?
prompt_resilience_5: What would you say to yourself from last week?
prompt_resilience_6: What boundary do you need to set to protect yourself?
prompt_resilience_7: How did you get back up last time you fell?
